todayRecommendation: Execute the planned easy 2-3 mile run as your final tune-up before race week. Keep it truly easy - this is about neuromuscular activation and routine, not fitness gain. Given last night's lower sleep score (67), extra conservatism is warranted.
weekProgress: Week 12 of 13 is complete at 210 TSS vs 200 target (105%). The true taper protocol was executed well - volume dropped appropriately with easy-moderate bike sessions (NP under 140w), one brick workout (Jul 6), controlled swim sessions maintaining race sharpness, and hip-protective run volumes. keyInsight: You're entering race week with appropriate taper fatigue dissipation, 13 brick sessions banked, and a proven conservative bike pacing strategy (66-69% FTP) that delivered a 16-minute run PR at Oceanside - trust that formula in 7 days.
